<<Executive Flight Strategy>>

Profit The executive has a total flight duration of 8 hours but must allocate 2 hours to solving a math problem, leaving only 6 hours for reading. Profit To finish the 480-page book within these remaining 6 hours, the executive must read at a minimum speed of 80 pages per hour. Profit This calculation ensures the book is completed exactly when the flight lands, balancing the demands of work and leisure.

Profit The excitement level of the thriller can be modeled using the exponential growth formula $E(t) = 100(1.05)^t$, where $t$ represents the time in hours. Profit Substituting the 8-hour flight duration into this equation yields an excitement level of approximately 147.75 units. Profit This result demonstrates how the suspense in the story intensifies significantly as the journey progresses.
